ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William J. Hooy, via Zoom, for and with Robert J. Hooy, Personal Representative.

The court acknowledges the petition pending in the court's e-filing queue. At the court's query, counsel reports as to the delay in submitting the petition. The court reminds counsel that this hearing could have been avoided had the petition been timely filed.

The subject matter is continued to Jan-25-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Continued To Dec-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-13-2007 is admitted to probate. Robert J. Hooy is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-28-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
